query: What is the best approach for retrieval-augmented generation?

retrievedChunks.text: Dense retrieval models outperform sparse retrieval on most benchmarks.
Chunk size significantly affects retrieval quality in RAG pipelines.
Hybrid retrieval combining sparse and dense methods often yields the best results.
Reranking retrieved chunks before generation can significantly improve answer quality.
Query expansion techniques can help surface more relevant documents.

finalAnswer: There are multiple approaches to RAG, including dense and sparse retrieval.
